MangaLens manual test page

Phase 5 end-to-end check. Enable MangaLens (Alt+Shift+M) after granting the optional host permission and setting an API key — see docs/PHASE-5-HANDOFF.md → "Manual verification". Serve this over http (e.g. npx serve tests/fixtures); file: image URLs are not background-fetchable.

NOTE: the images below are self-contained, hand-drawn public-domain SVG placeholders (authored here, no external assets) so the page works with zero binary fixtures — they exercise scanning, the ignore heuristics, overlay positioning, tiling, and the MutationObserver. For a REAL provider round-trip (actual OCR + translation) drop 2–3 public-domain manga/webtoon JPGs into tests/fixtures/images/ and point the <img> srcs at them — see images/README.md.

Placeholder art © none — released to the public domain (CC0) by the MangaLens authors. Replace with real public-domain fixtures for a full translation test.
